zh.lifeSummary: 當William Peche於1421年出生在英國肯特盧勒林斯同時，他的父親John Peche32歲，母親Mary Shelley27歲。他於1440年與Lady Beatrix Chichele在法國培結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1487年4月9日在英國肯特艾斯福德享年66歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可倫敦 聖 波托爾福 比曉普蓋特 亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Peche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: possibly a variant of   Pech   ‘pitch, tar’.
Americanized form of Slovenian Peče or of its Germanized form Petsche , which is also a Gottscheerish (i.e. Gottschee German) surname.

variants.name: Pech
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Jose, Manuel, Alvaro, Diego, Edelmira, Emilio, Francisco, Gilberto, Jorge, Jose Angel.  German Gerhard, Hans, Ilse, Lutz, Manfred, Wolf.

Czech and Slovak; Sorbian (Pěch and P'ech): from a pet form of the personal name Petr (Czech), Pětš (Lower Sorbian), and Peter (Slovak). This is also a Germanized form of the Upper Sorbian cognate Pjech.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): from Middle High German pech (German Pech) ‘pitch, tar’, presumably a nickname for someone with exceptionally dark skin or hair, or a metonymic occupational name for someone who prepared, sold, or used pitch. This may in part also be the origin of a homonymic Polish, Czech, and Slovak surname (compare above and below).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When William Peche was born in 1421, in Lullingstone, Kent, England, his father, John Peche, was 32 and his mother, Mary Shelley, was 27. He married Lady Beatrix Chichele in 1440, in Perche, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 9 April 1487, in Eynsford, Kent, England, at the age of 66, and was buried in London Saint Botolph Bishopgate Churchyard, Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Peche est né en 1421, à Lullingstone, Kent, Angleterre, son père, John Peche, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Mary Shelley, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Lady Beatrix Chichele en 1440, à Perche, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 9 avril 1487, à Eynsford, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à London Saint Botolph Bishopgate Churchyard, Middlesex, Angleterre.

Er hat 1440 in Perche, Frankreich Lady Beatrix Chichele geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 9. April 1487 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Eynsford, Kent, England und wurde in London Saint Botolph Bishopgate Churchyard, Middlesex, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: William Pecheが1421年にイギリスケントルリングストーンで生まれた時，父John Pecheは32歳，母Mary Shelleyは27歳であった。1440年にフランスペルチェでLady Beatrix Chicheleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1487年4月9日にイギリスケントエインスフォードで66歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスロンドン サイント ボトルフ ビショプガト チャーチヤルドにて埋葬された。

ko.London Saint Botolph Bishopgate Churchya: 영국 미들레세스 런던 세인트 벗프 비숍가트 c후르c히아어드
ko.lifeSummary: William Peche(이)가 1421년 영국 켄트 루링스톤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Peche(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Shelley(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1440년 프랑스 퍼체에서 Lady Beatrix Chichele(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1487년 4월 9일 영국 켄트 이스퍼드에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 런던 세인트 벗프 비숍가트 c후르c히아어드에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Lady Beatrix Chichele em 1440, em Perche, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. ru.London Saint Botolph Bishopgate Churchya: лондон сеинт ботолф бишопгэит чурчярд, миддлесекс, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Peche родился в 1421 г. в местности луллингстоун, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени John Peche было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Mary Shelley, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Beatrix Chichele в 1440 г. в местности пирч, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 9 апреля 1487 г. в местности эинсфорд, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности лондон сеинт ботолф бишопгэит чурчярд, миддлесекс, Англия.
